title: bromus diandrus subsp. maximus
intro: Bromus diandrus subsp. maximus, also known as the Great Brome or False Brome, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Bromus diandrus subsp. maximus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
